/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libserver.so -o libserver.so CMakeFiles/server.dir/acceptor.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/connection.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/game.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/gamematch.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/httprequest.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/httpresponse.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/server.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/websocket.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hello/Documents/Game/build/src/network:/home/hello/Documents/Game/build/src/utils:/home/hello/Documents/Game/build/src/database ../network/libnetwork.so ../utils/libutils.so ../database/libdatabase.so
